architecture.note: F2 no-error-state, F3 no-timeout, F4 no-failure-test all live in the reused ProductControl/useAssignChangeProduct/api-client — pre-existing, neighbour-ring, out of this WP's Contract

frontend_a11y.note: all WPF gates pass; tokens-only, always-in-DOM affordance, >=44px, never-colour-alone, no nested-interactive, jest-axe both themes both states

quality.note: MEDIUM: withProductsRoute/boardFetch duplicated across 5 test files -> extracted to _productsFetch.ts

findings.evidence: withProductsRoute / boardFetch helpers defined identically in 5 test files
findings.fix: Extracted to client/src/tests/_productsFetch.ts; all 5 files import it (EP-03).

findings.evidence: saveState maps only idle/saving/saved; no isError branch
findings.note: Assign error surfacing is a property of the shared ProductControl + useAssignChangeProduct (existing ProductPicker has the same behaviour). Not in WP-008 Contract; would be a cross-cutting change to the shared primitive.
Affects every mutation through the funnel; not introduced by this WP; not in Contract.
Paired with F-A2/F-A3 (no error surface to assert). The WP Contract's DoD specifies happy-path assign + chip + a11y; failure-path is a follow-on once the shared primitive grows an error surface.

verdict: Approve with fixes (the one in-changes MEDIUM addressed inline; remaining findings are neighbour-ring/out-of-scope)
